title: Two probationary RTO inspectors caught taking bribe by Lokayukta Police in Bengaluru
description: The accused have been identified as Kiran S.P. (37) and Dinesh Kumar D.K. (48), both probationary IMV Inspectors posted at Nelamangala RTO, along with a private individual, Ramesh (40), a lorry driver from Nelamangala taluk
